zh.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara於1055年出生在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納拉可。他和Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他在西班牙加利西亞被列為regidor (regulus)。他去世於1126年在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納桑亞格 德 可波斯特拉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara于1055年出生在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納拉可。他和Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他在西班牙加利西亞被列为regidor (regulus)。他去世于1126年在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納桑亞格 德 可波斯特拉享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara was born in 1055, in Laxe, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues. His occupation is listed as regidor (regulus) in Galicia, Spain. He died in 1126, in Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain, at the age of 71.

Sa profession de son indiquée est regidor (regulus) à Galicia, Espagne. Il est décédé en 1126, à Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara(은)는 1055년 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 라세에서 태어났다. 그는 Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스페인 갈리샤에서 regidor (regulus)이었다. 그는 1126년 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 산티아고 데 콤포스텔아에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara nasceu em 1055, em Laxe, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues. Sua profissão aparece como regidor (regulus) em Galicia, Espanha. Ele faleceu em 1126, em Santiago de Compostela, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara родился в 1055 г. в местности лакс, а коруnа, галися, Испания. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues.  Он работал по профессии regidor (regulus) в местности галися, Испания. Он умер в 1126 г. в местности сантяго де компостела, а коруnа, галися, Испания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara nació en 1055, en Lage, La Coruña, Galicia, España. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues. Su ocupación registrada era regidor (regulus) en Galicia, España. Murió en 1126, en Santiago de Compostela, La Coruña, Galicia, España, a la edad de 71 años.
